div.h1: Raft Consensus Algorithm: Node State Machine
div.p: Reference: IEEE Specification / Diego Ongaro's Raft Paper Intel Technical Design Standard - Layout v2.1

ul.li: Responds to RPCs from candidates and leaders.
If term T > currentTerm: set currentTerm = T, convert to follower.
If majority received: convert to leader.
If RPC from new leader: convert to follower.
Maintain nextIndex[] and matchIndex[] for all followers.
nextIndex[]: (init to leader last log index + 1)

g.text: MEMORY LAYOUT: PERSISTENT STATE (On-Disk Stable Storage)

ul.li: Implementation Note: Election timeouts must be randomized to prevent split votes in Candidate state.
currentTerm: Latest term server has seen (monotonic).
votedFor: CandidateId that received vote in current term (or null).
log[]: Log entries; each entry contains command for state machine, and term when entry was received by leader.
